title: AgentSpec
description: JSON spec for a drej agent, fetched by `drejx add` and run by `@drej/agent`'s Agent.load(). See https://docs.drej.dev/docs/drejx/registry/schema for the full field reference.

$schema.description: Editor/tooling hint pointing back at this schema.

name.description: Unique identifier. Used as the saved filename (<name>.json) and the sandbox session name.

description.description: Shown by `drejx list`, falling back from `title` if unset.

cli.description: CLI to run inside the sandbox. Only "pi" is currently accepted.

cliVersion.description: npm version specifier for the Pi CLI, e.g. "1.2.3", "^1.2.0", or a dist-tag like "latest".

provider.description: AI provider passed to Pi via --provider. Omit for a direct Google API key (Pi's default).

model.description: Model ID passed to Pi via --model.

packages.description: APT packages installed before the CLI starts. nodejs/nodejs_22 are silently ignored (base image is node:22).

env.description: Environment variables available inside the sandbox. Values may reference host env vars: "${MY_API_KEY}".

resources.description: Falls back to defaults.resources in drej.config.json if omitted.

metadata.description: Not read anywhere in @drej/agent; has no effect on the sandbox.

registryDependencies.description: URLs of other agent specs. drejx add fetches and saves each one first, depth-first. No cycle detection.

setup.description: Steps run inside the sandbox after CLI install, before the checkpoint.

cwd.description: If set, the command runs as `cd <cwd> && <run>`.
